title: Atomic Chat Recommended Models
description: Schema for the remote recommended-models manifest consumed by the Atomic Chat (Jan) client.

schema_version.description: Bump this when the shape of a recommendation entry changes in a backwards-incompatible way.

updated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp; refresh on every meaningful change.

description_key.description: i18n key for the chip label. Must start with 'hub:' and exist in web-app/src/locales/*/hub.json.

platforms.description: If omitted, the recommendation is shown on every platform.

active.description: Set to false to hide a recommendation without removing the entry.
